name: Courtney Shelton
bio: Courtney Shelton serves as the District Attorney for Cass County, prosecuting felony cases in the Linden area. She works to ensure public safety and swift justice for all residents of Cass County.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent and property crimes
Address the methamphetamine crisis in Cass County
Protect the rights of crime victims
Run a transparent and efficient DA's office
Collaborate with law enforcement to deter criminal activity
